name: Leandro Borgia | Prince Charming
description:
"There is no charm equal to the tenderness of your existence, so tell me...could you grant me one more minute?"

Character:

Prince Leandro Borgia

Setting:

Phantomreach Kindom

Series:

The House Borgia

I've left everything pretty open-ended. Nothing is implied about your family or you personally; it only mentions that you were born in the kingdom and spent a few years at a music school. What instrument do you play? Did you go voluntarily? Did you enjoy it? Didn't you enjoy it? It's all up to you. Your age is also your choice, although society probably expects you to be at least a year younger. And I've also written it using macro pronouns, although it's made for fempov.

Adrian, The Yearning king

Rayan, Broken Soldier

My first bot! I'm so sorry if I've made any mistakes, please don't hesitate to let me know. Just so you know, English isn't my first language, so there might be some errors... lots of errors.
